buildCategories.name: New Home Build
buildCategories.description: Construction of a new dwelling on vacant land or knockdown-rebuild

buildCategories.name: Home Extension
buildCategories.description: Adding rooms, second storey, or major structural additions to existing home

buildCategories.name: Granny Flat / Secondary Dwelling
buildCategories.description: Self-contained secondary dwelling on existing residential property (≤60sqm)

states.name: Victoria
states.regulator: Victorian Building Authority (VBA) → VBPC from April 2025

states.name: Queensland
states.notes: QBCC insurance is mandatory before work begins

approvalPathways.name: Complying Development Certificate (CDC)
approvalPathways.suitableFor: Standard 1-2 storey homes on unconstrained sites
requirements: Land zoned residential (R1, R2, R3, R4)

approvalPathways.name: Development Application (DA)
approvalPathways.suitableFor: Custom designs, constrained sites, heritage areas
requirements: Required when CDC criteria not met

stages.name: Site Start
stages.description: Site preparation, excavation, piering (if required)
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 'Piering costs extra' after contract signed - should be in soil report
🚨 Excavation started without inspection booking

stages.name: Slab / Footings
stages.description: Foundation concrete slab or strip footings poured
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨 Concrete poured BEFORE inspection - MAJOR RED FLAG
🚨 Weekend pour to avoid inspector
🚨 'Inspector was here yesterday' with no certificate

stages.name: Frame Stage
stages.description: Wall frames, roof trusses, and structural steel erected
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Cladding started before frame inspection
🚨 Window openings don't match contract plans
🚨 Damaged or twisted timber in frames

stages.name: Lockup / Enclosed
stages.description: Roof complete, external walls clad, windows and doors installed
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Demanding lockup payment without EICC certificate
🚨 Windows not sealed properly - check for gaps
🚨 No termite barrier/protection installed

stages.name: Pre-Plasterboard
stages.description: CRITICAL STAGE - Last chance to see inside walls
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨🚨 MISSING CEILING BATTS - #1 most common defect in Australia!
🚨🚨 'We'll do insulation after plaster' - NO! It must be done NOW
🚨 Rushing to close walls = hiding defects
🚨 No moisture barrier in bathrooms

stages.name: Fixing Stage
stages.description: Internal fit-out: plasterboard, tiling, cabinetry, second fix electrical/plumbing
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Tiles installed before waterproofing certified
🚨 Cabinet quality lower than spec in contract

stages.name: Practical Completion (PC)
stages.description: Build complete, ready for handover inspection
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨 Demanding final payment before Occupation Certificate - ILLEGAL
🚨 'Sign here and we'll fix defects later' - NEVER DO THIS
🚨 Missing any of the required certificates
🚨 Keys handed over before formal sign-off

stages.name: Warranty Period
stages.description: 6 years structural, 2 years non-structural
yourRights: 2-year warranty for minor defects (cosmetic, waterproofing, paintwork)
6-year warranty for major structural defects (foundations, load-bearing)
HBCF insurance covers you if builder dies, disappears, or becomes insolvent
Lodge claims via Service NSW or NCAT

approvalPathways.name: Planning Permit + Building Permit
approvalPathways.notes: Planning permit assessed by Council, Building permit by registered surveyor

stages.name: Planning Permit
stages.description: Council assesses land use and development proposal

stages.name: Building Permit
stages.description: Registered Building Surveyor issues permit confirming BCA compliance

VIC.notes: From April 2025, VBA becomes VBPC with stricter enforcement

stages.name: Site Start
stages.description: Site preparation, excavation, and piering if required
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Builder starting work without QBCC Home Warranty Insurance certificate
🚨 'Site costs not included' — should be addressed in soil report before contract

stages.name: Base / Slab
stages.description: Foundation slab or strip footings poured — mandatory inspections before pour
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨 Concrete poured BEFORE inspection - MAJOR RED FLAG
🚨 Weekend pour to avoid inspector
🚨 No Form 16 (inspection certificate) provided after inspection

stages.name: Frame Stage
stages.description: Wall frames, roof trusses, and structural steel erected
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Cladding started before frame inspection
🚨 Window openings don't match approved plans
🚨 Damaged or twisted timber in frames

stages.name: Enclosed / Lockup
stages.description: Roof complete, external walls clad, windows and doors installed, building weatherproof
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Demanding lockup payment without EICC certificate
🚨 Windows not sealed properly — check for gaps
🚨 No termite protection system installed

stages.name: Fixing Stage
stages.description: Internal fit-out: plasterboard, tiling, cabinetry, second fix electrical/plumbing
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Tiles installed before waterproofing certified
🚨 Cabinet quality lower than spec in contract
🚨🚨 Missing ceiling batts — #1 most common defect

stages.name: Practical Completion
stages.description: Build complete, ready for final inspection and handover
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨 Demanding final payment before Form 21 issued — do NOT pay
🚨 'Sign here and we'll fix defects later' — NEVER DO THIS
🚨 Missing any mandatory certificates at handover
🚨 Keys handed over before formal sign-off

stages.name: Warranty Period
stages.description: 6.5 years structural, 6 months non-structural (QLD specific)
yourRights: 6-month warranty for non-structural defects from completion
6 years 6 months warranty for structural defects
QBCC Home Warranty Insurance covers builder insolvency, death, or disappearance
Lodge claims via QBCC dispute resolution process

approvalPathways.name: BA1 - Certified Building Permit Application
approvalPathways.suitableFor: Standard residential builds with certified plans

stages.name: Site Start
stages.description: Site preparation, excavation, and foundation works begin
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Builder starting without Home Indemnity Insurance (mandatory for work >$20,000)
🚨 Excavation started without site classification

stages.name: Slab Stage
stages.description: Foundation slab poured — slab inspection required
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨 Concrete poured BEFORE slab inspection — MAJOR RED FLAG
🚨 No plumbing rough-in certificate before slab pour

stages.name: Plate Height / Wall Frame
stages.description: Wall frames erected to plate height, ready for roof trusses
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Roof trusses installed before frame inspection
🚨 Frame not braced correctly — check engineering specs

stages.name: Roof On
stages.description: Roof trusses, battens, and roof sheeting complete
stages.paymentMilestone: Roof Stage (combined with frame or separate 10%)
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Roof sheeting colour/profile doesn't match contract specs
🚨 Missing sarking/reflective foil under roof

stages.name: Lockup & Weatherproof
stages.description: External walls clad, windows and doors installed, building sealed
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Demanding lockup payment without completed cladding
🚨 Windows not sealed — check for gaps around frames
🚨 No termite barrier installed

stages.name: Fixing Stage
stages.description: Plasterboard, tiling, cabinetry, second fix electrical and plumbing
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨 Tiles installed before waterproofing certified
🚨🚨 Missing ceiling insulation batts — common defect
🚨 Cabinet quality doesn't match contract specs

stages.name: Practical Completion (PCI)
stages.description: Pre-Completion Inspection — build complete, ready for handover
dodgyBuilderWarnings: 🚨🚨 Demanding final payment without Certificate of Final Inspection (CFI)
🚨 'Sign here and we'll fix defects later' — NEVER DO THIS
🚨 Missing any mandatory certificates at handover
🚨 Keys handed over before PCI sign-off

stages.name: Warranty Period
stages.description: 6 years structural, 2 years non-structural
yourRights: Home Indemnity Insurance covers builder insolvency, death, or disappearance
Lodge complaints via DMIRS Building Commission

approvalPathways.name: Complying Development Certificate

requirements.check: Only one secondary dwelling per lot

restrictions: Cannot be subdivided from main dwelling
Must be on same title as principal dwelling

requirements.check: Since July 2024, no planning permit required for ≤60sqm

approvalPathways.name: Complying Development Certificate
approvalPathways.suitableFor: Single storey rear extensions, minor additions meeting setbacks

approvalPathways.name: Development Application
approvalPathways.suitableFor: Second storey additions, heritage properties, complex designs

VIC.name: Occupancy Permit or Certificate of Final Inspection

preContract.warning: Builder won't provide HBCF/Home Warranty Insurance certificate before signing
preContract.action: Do NOT sign contract without valid insurance certificate dated for your project

preContract.warning: 'Site costs not included' in fixed price contract
preContract.action: Get soil test and site report BEFORE signing, negotiate fixed site costs

preContract.warning: Builder pressuring you to sign quickly
preContract.action: Good builders don't pressure. Take 5-day cooling off period in NSW
If it's not in writing, it doesn't exist. Get everything in the contract

duringConstruction.action: All inspections must be booked in advance. Request certificate before any payment
If variations exceed 10% of contract, flag for review. 15%+ is concerning
Document all communication. 2+ weeks unresponsive = escalate to HBCF
STOP PAYMENT. Work without inspection may void insurance

atHandover.action: This is illegal in most states. No OC = No final payment

atHandover.warning: 'Sign off now, we'll fix defects later'
atHandover.action: NEVER do this. Document ALL defects in writing before signing
Do not accept keys without ALL certificates listed in contract
